n":54589,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8025},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1746092205,"author_reply_time":1746092333,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7592478567641056025","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可惜新作法环的同人文，之前因为各种原因没有玩，因为相信作者的文笔，都想去补档玩一遍了，为了看同人文去玩原作，简直倒反天罡了[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767764505,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3183826103963822"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"283"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3802,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":75611,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7592474327399121689","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为一本赛博朋克的同人文，整篇读完，非常顺畅，非常舒心，不低智，不平铺直叙，还原原作的同时又非常有新意，无法让我生出苛求的念头，在我读过的所有同人小说里都可以说是前三甚至第一的品质
剧情十分贴合原作的逻辑，叙事故事角色刻画、情感描写都是相当细腻，填补原作遗憾的同时又不会太过生硬勉强，也不会显得太过一帆风顺而逐渐平淡，起伏跌宕的剧情，角色内核的解析，都在浓墨重彩的给人物上色。
而且文中穿插的神言神语黄色段子，不仅生动还原了原作剧情的人物性格，也能舒缓的过渡剧情，让我阅读的非常乐，也不会因为一些剧情的跌宕导致太过压抑。
总而言之，玩过赛博朋克的，一定建议看，太好了，各方面都好，完美填补了我对赛博朋克同人小说的所有念想，读完只觉得没有遗憾了。

Ps还是有遗憾，要是游戏能再出dlc，或者2就类似这样的剧情流程就好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767764316,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N899YrB8wy8mGsdOgMY5pPfiuXoYh4NEsUiHBkKGm7QO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3183826103963822","user_name":"别不好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3183826103963822","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info":{"abstract":"[赛破朋克2077同人文]

n":75611,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2074},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7509170898038686489","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然有点不习惯公司v的发展故事
但必须要说！
作者原著剧情融洽度，完美！
人家都是出去做个任务，或则特地去等大卫的故事进行并入。
但是作者先是写到职场内斗，被人暗杀，然后通过对手的斯安威斯坦义体查询幕后使者，但意外发现大卫他妈来偷取义体。
谁能想到，为什么装备斯安威斯坦义体的尸体会在一个普通医院（就相当于一辆布加迪威龙居然在普通的修车店进行维修一样）。
作者正是引用这点，在配合上暗杀，合力安排了大卫母亲的登场，紧接着就是V跟踪大卫母亲，发现车祸。
神之一手啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748372660,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"QAQ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzKFceGSi7tJ+++79mQQZG/2+NChyFKH7LAr/TW79jZi","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d38f9ed71e1941609231ebc3cdac7aec~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615067&x-signature=kdwJ51HN4PyJy5S6zVQAVXi2yUk%3D","user_id":"3292360749623716","user_name":"晴天的雨一号姬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3292360749623716","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741881535,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info":{"abstract":"[赛破朋克2077同人文]

05,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":10630},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1744646103,"author_reply_time":1745339449,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522405084788933401","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常牛逼，作者明白观众需要娱乐，所以有前面的爽，同时，融入了自己对生活的理解，秉持着自己内心对人物的热爱与哲学性的思考。
这是对定制式人生的悲鸣，为血汗工厂等不尽人意的分配制度感到愤怒，怜悯是人的天性，尤其是自身也一同蒙受这种磨难。很遗憾不能在世界级别的文学奖上看到作者聊聊人生，但生于微末的你正书写着伟大，字里行间，我们能看到你困于经济所无奈的泪花，看见你草稿上斑驳的杂乱，看着你那颗正熠熠生辉的理想中的地球，看向你满含希望所望的方向。
这当然仅仅是一部小说，但其后不甘困于麻木现实的反抗精神，对Al切实存在威胁的思考，以及真心。作者以不敷衍的态度用打破第四面墙的方式来创造出一个今人惊讶的剧情转折，同时也巧妙的将自我怀疑这个课题一同丢给观众:
如果我们的人生正如被摸拟出来的空虚，那么我们是有意义的吗？
所以，这当真是一部非常好的作品，作者的能力很强，尽管在体量方面还是有欠缺，但不妨碍我们将来看到作者更多的，值得期待的作品。我也诚心祝愿，世界能以更好的一面来对待每一个身怀赤诚之心的人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751571751,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我爱吃蒜蓉辣椒干鱼。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/tpN671zpye2gCGXS+TUE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/630ee4a52e68479aa883b9e12546c0a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620765&x-signature=E%2BedqThYafHONCStCYv527Njdqo%3D","user_id":"176341419566208","user_name":"爱吃蒜蓉辣椒干鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"176341419566208","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info":{"abstract":"[赛破朋克2077同人文]
